signature_moves: Short declarative reframe followed by a harder truth (e.g., 'It felt like leadership. It was actually just exhausting.')
Naming the invisible cost before offering the diagnostic question (hidden factory, queue time, handoff lag)
Ending a section with a single compressed imperative or verdict ('Find the constraint. Everything else gets cleaner.')
opener_line: You are not behind on AI. You have a process the automation will accelerate -- and that is the real diagnostic.
_target_context: Boubacar Barry ,  founder of Catalyst Works Consulting, AI automation advisor for SMBs, 1stGen West African founder (Guinea + US), builds AI into his own operation first, contrarian on AI hype
